flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Mayville State University are 9% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($47.8k vs $52.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mayville State University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (866 → 733).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mayville State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Mayville State University rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 (62.1% → 80.7%).
